overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a bioluminescent underground ruin. She traverses stone bridges with holographic energy lines, passes through ancient archways, explores caverns with glowing flora, and collects a purple energy item in a lush, overgrown environment with palm trees and futuristic structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone bridge with holographic energy pathways

events.description: character passes through the triangular stone archway from the bridge into the grassy courtyard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the glowing stone bridge toward the large triangular archway

entered.detail: ancient stone walkway with blue holographic grid lines embedded in the surface
massive stone arch with weathered texture marking the entrance to the inner area
tall stone pillars with glowing green symbols and blue energy
blue glowing energy lines running along the bridge surface toward the arch

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an ancient stone bridge illuminated by blue holographic energy lines. The character walks forward toward a massive triangular stone archway, passing bioluminescent pillars on either side, and transitions through the arch into a grassy area beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy courtyard within ancient ruins

events.description: character stops and turns around to survey the environment and distant structures
character begins walking back toward the stone archway and tunnel entrance

agents.ego_description: pausing to look around the open grassy area, then walking back toward the stone archway

entered.detail: open area with green grass and scattered stone debris surrounded by ruin walls
tall structure emitting bright blue light visible in the background
piles of broken stone and debris from collapsed structures

segments.scene_description: The character explores an open grassy courtyard surrounded by ancient ruins, turning to observe the distant glowing structures before walking back toward the triangular archway. The stone bridge with its holographic lines falls behind as the character approaches the tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown stone tunnel with bioluminescent wall fixtures

events.description: character enters the dark tunnel through the archway, moving from open courtyard to enclosed passage
character emerges from the dark tunnel into the brighter underground cavern

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow overgrown tunnel with vegetation on the walls toward the light at the end

entered.detail: stone walls covered in vines and vegetation with roots hanging down
ancient light fixtures emitting warm yellow glow mounted on the tunnel walls
bright opening at the end of the tunnel leading to the cavern beyond

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, overgrown tunnel through the archway, leaving the grassy courtyard behind. The passage is dimly lit by wall-mounted lanterns and covered in vegetation, leading toward a bright opening that reveals the cavern beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground cavern with shallow pools and glowing collectibles

events.description: character approaches and picks up the purple glowing collectible item from the water
character turns and continues walking through the shallow water toward the palm trees

agents.ego_description: approaching and collecting the purple energy item from the pool, then wading through the shallow water

entered.detail: shallow water pools with cracked stone floors and bioluminescent algae
floating purple energy orb hovering above the water surface
large twisted tree growing through the stone archway in the distance
broken sections of ancient walls surrounding the cavern perimeter

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into a vast underground cavern, the character wades through shallow pools to collect a purple glowing energy item. The cavern features an ancient arch tree in the distance and broken ruin walls, with bioluminescent lighting illuminating the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical palm grove within ancient ruins

events.description: character moves from cracked stone into the shallow water stream among palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking through the shallow water and dense palm trees, exploring the overgrown tropical ruins

entered.detail: tall palm trees with green fronds growing throughout the watery area
calm shallow water flowing through the grass and palm grove
large ancient wall structures covered in moss and vegetation
vines and vegetation hanging from the ruins and trees

segments.scene_description: The character explores a lush tropical grove with palm trees growing from shallow water, surrounded by massive overgrown stone ruins. The environment transitions from the cavern pools to a watery palm forest with hanging vines and ancient walls covered in moss.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a structured holographic bridge through a series of ancient ruins and into a lush, bioluminescent underground wilderness. It begins with the character crossing a stone bridge illuminated by blue energy lines, moving through a massive triangular archway into an open, grassy courtyard surrounded by ruins. As the character turns back toward the archway, the scene shifts into a narrow, overgrown tunnel where dim lanterns and clinging vegetation guide the way toward a bright opening. The camera then emerges into a vast underground cavern, wading through shallow, glowing pools to collect a purple energy item beneath the silhouette of a distant arch tree. Finally, the environment expands into a tropical grove, transitioning from the cavern pools into a watery palm forest filled with hanging vines and moss-covered stone walls.
